title: Ethical, Inclusive, and Accessible User Research · Claim Repair Board
summary: A preserved decision record for ethical, inclusive, and accessible user research contains one plausible evidence, scope, design, implementation, evaluation, or ownership defect. Find the first unsupported claim before changing the product. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in consented inclusive research packet and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and eviden…
objectives: Frame neutral research questions around behavior, context, barriers, and decisions instead of selling a preferred solution.
Recruit relevant variation in ability, device, language, connectivity, role, and problem experience without claiming representativeness.
Explain purpose, recording, storage, withdrawal, incentives, and power relationships in accessible consent before participation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# personal-project-1 cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: personal-project-1
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments
evidence:

steps.title: Inspect the failure record · Debug Research Question
steps.instruction:
debug case — A research plan recruits only friends, records full sessions indefinitely, and excludes participants who need captions, flexible timing, or nonvisual materials. The debug variation 6 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Frame neutral research questions around behavior, context, barriers, and decisions instead of selling a preferred solution.

Inspect the Research Question trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Inspect the failure record · Debug Research Question.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for frame neutral research questions around behavior, context, barriers, and decisions instead of selling a preferred solution. For Inspect the failure record · Debug Research Question, keep Research Question connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.text: For Research Question, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

hints: For Inspect the failure record · Debug Research Question, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Research Question precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Inspect the failure record · Debug Research Question, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A research plan recruits only friends, records full sessions indefinitely, and excludes participants who need captions, flexible timing, or nonvisual materials. The debug variation 6 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Frame neutral research questions around behavior, context, barriers, and decisions instead of selling a preferred solution.

For Inspect the failure record · Debug Research Question, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Asking whether users like the idea measures authentic need.

stimulus.title: Research Question case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: A research plan recruits only friends, records full sessions indefinitely, and excludes participants who need captions, flexible timing, or nonvisual materials. The debug variation 6 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Frame neutral research questions around behavior, context, barriers, and decisions instead of selling a preferred solution.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Asking whether users like the idea measures authentic need.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Frame neutral research questions around behavior, context, barriers, and decisions instead of selling a preferred solution. Artifact under review: consented inclusive research packet.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Research Question, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample. That claim does not survive the inspect the failure record evidence boundary.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.

steps.title: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Synthesis Contradiction

content.code:
pp1-synthesis-contradiction-1ffs69:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

steps.title: Publish the incident record · Debug Synthesis Contradiction

The debug variation 4 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Synthesize patterns with source links, counterevidence, minority needs, uncertainty, and quotations short enough to protect identity.
